description: Add a lot details page for locataire role, reusing the gestionnaire LotDetailsClient with a role prop. Scoped to 3 tabs (Contrats, Interventions, Documents). Includes a 'Voir les details' button on the dashboard purple card.

userStories.title: Refactor LotDetailsClient with role prop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want LotDetailsClient to accept a role prop so that the same component works for gestionnaire and locataire with scoped tabs and actions.
acceptanceCriteria: role prop added (default: 'gestionnaire')
contacts and buildingContacts props made optional (default: [])
Tabs filtered: locataire sees only contracts, interventions, documents
Default tab: 'contracts' for locataire, 'overview' for gestionnaire
Header actions empty for locataire (no Modifier/Supprimer/Creer intervention)
Back button navigates to /locataire/dashboard for locataire role
InterventionsNavigator uses userContext matching role
Intervention links use /locataire/... prefix for locataire
Contract empty state hides 'Creer un contrat' button for locataire
Gestionnaire behavior unchanged (regression check)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added role prop with isLocataire derived boolean. Tab filtering, action hiding, back nav, empty states all conditioned on role. Zero new lint warnings.

userStories.title: Create locataire lot details server page
userStories.description: As a locataire, I want to access /locataire/lots/[id] to see my lot details with contracts, interventions and documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Route exists at app/locataire/(no-navbar)/lots/[id]/page.tsx
Uses getServerAuthContext('locataire') for auth
Verifies locataire has access to lot via contract_contacts
Redirects to /locataire/dashboard if no access
Fetches lot, contracts, interventions, interventionsWithDocs in parallel
Passes role='locataire' to LotDetailsClient
Passes empty contacts and buildingContacts arrays
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Server page with contract_contacts access check, parallel data fetching, address resolution. Reuses LotDetailsClient with role='locataire'.

userStories.title: Add 'Voir les details' button on dashboard purple card
userStories.description: As a locataire, I want a 'Voir les details' button on my dashboard property card so I can navigate to the lot details page.
acceptanceCriteria: Outlined white button with ExternalLink icon under property details line
Only visible when a specific lot is selected (not 'Vue d'ensemble')
Links to /locataire/lots/{currentProperty.id}
Button styled consistently with the purple card theme
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Outlined Link with ExternalLink icon, ml-7 aligned with property details, white/40 border on purple card.
